basic US order with no coupon
SAVE10 coupon applies 10%
HALF coupon for VIP applies 50%
EU tax rate is 20%
empty order still charges base shipping
SAVE20 over threshold applies 20%
SAVE20 under threshold falls back to 10%
HALF coupon is ignored for non-VIP
VIP floor gives 5% when no coupon
VIP floor never reduces a larger coupon discount
express fee is additive on free-shipping tier
express fee is additive on the lowest shipping tier
unknown region uses the 10% default tax
cent rounding on fractional line totals
